_about: TEMPLATE. Do not commit a real env.json (it holds machine-specific absolute paths). Run `python scripts/setup.py` (cross-platform; setup.ps1 = Windows wrapper) to auto-detect tools and generate config/env.json for your machine.
pdftoppm: pdftoppm  (on PATH, or scoop/poppler full path)
validatePy: scripts/check_pptx.py  (bundled MIT fallback; setup.ps1 uses the pptx skill's validate.py instead if present)
_requires: Node + Python + LibreOffice + Chrome + poppler(pdftoppm). Validation is self-contained via scripts/check_pptx.py; the official `pptx` skill is optional (stronger XSD).
